variants: Norine Thibodeau is a prominent adventure guide currently living in Roseglade Station. Born on Cloudmarsh Isle, she pursued her education at Zinnia Heights College, where she discovered her dedication to the great outdoors. Now working at Talondrift Adventures, Norine communicates in Haitian Creole text while leading outdoor excursions. Her role involves engaging with clients and sharing her passion for nature with those around her.
